question: Will the Fed cut interest rates at the June 2026 FOMC meeting?
description: Market on whether the Federal Reserve will lower the federal funds rate at the June 2026 FOMC meeting.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the Fed announces a rate cut at the June 2026 meeting. Resolves No otherwise.

question: Will WHO declare the end of the COVID-19 public health emergency by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if WHO has officially declared the end of the COVID-19 PHEIC by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will SpaceX successfully launch Starship to orbit by Dec 2026?
description: Market on SpaceX Starship reaching orbit.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a Starship vehicle reaches a stable Earth orbit (at least one complete orbit) by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will the US GDP growth rate exceed 3% in Q3 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the annualized Q3 2026 US GDP growth rate (advance estimate) is 3.0% or higher.

question: Will a major AI company announce a model with >90% on MMLU by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Anthropic, or Meta announces a model exceeding 90% on MMLU-Pro benchmark by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will the S&P 500 close above 7000 by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the S&P 500 closes at or above 7000 on any trading day before Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will a new COVID-19 variant be designated a variant of concern by WHO in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if WHO designates a new SARS-CoV-2 variant as a Variant of Concern (VOC) in 2026.

question: Will the EU implement a digital euro pilot by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the European Central Bank launches a digital euro pilot program by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will the global average temperature exceed 1.5C above pre-industrial levels in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the global annual average temperature for 2026 exceeds 1.5C above pre-industrial levels per NASA or NOAA data.

question: Will a US state pass a comprehensive AI regulation law by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if any US state legislature passes and the governor signs a comprehensive AI regulation bill by Dec 31, 2026.
